title: KanbanAI v0.1 Is Live: Meet Your New AI Workflow Copilot
excerpt: Today we are launching KanbanAI v0.1. Here is what shipped, how each AI feature works, and why this first release is built to help you move from messy ideas to clear, shippable plans.
author: Kanban AI Team
body:
# KanbanAI v0.1 Is Live

Today is launch day.

After months of building, testing, and rewriting flows with early users, **KanbanAI v0.1** is now live. This release is focused on one goal: helping teams turn rough ideas into organized execution without drowning in planning overhead.

---

## Visual Snapshot

```text
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ                    KANBANAI v0.1                          в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ  Idea Capture  ->  AI Breakdown  ->  Smart Priorities     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      вҶ“                   вҶ“                  вҶ“              в”Ӯ

в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

Think of KanbanAI as a copilot that sits between the blank page and your actual sprint board.

---

## What Is New in v0.1

### 1) AI Task Breakdown
Paste a project concept, feature request, or rough note and KanbanAI generates a structured set of actionable tasks.

**Why it matters:** You skip the "where do we even start?" step and move directly into execution.

### 2) Context-Aware Prioritization
KanbanAI suggests task priority by considering urgency, dependencies, and execution order.

**Why it matters:** Teams spend less time debating order and more time shipping.

### 3) Smart Card Generation
Instead of empty board columns, KanbanAI creates ready-to-edit cards with meaningful titles and practical descriptions.

**Why it matters:** Better cards mean faster handoffs and fewer follow-up questions.

### 4) AI Planning Prompts
You can use guided prompts to reshape vague goals into specific plans (for product, engineering, and operations workflows).

**Why it matters:** It helps both planners and builders stay aligned from day one.

### 5) Iterative Refinement Loop
Generated tasks are not locked. You can tweak, regenerate, and refine suggestions in seconds.

**Why it matters:** AI stays collaborative instead of becoming a rigid one-shot output.

---

## Before vs After (v0.1 Experience)

| Workflow Stage | Before KanbanAI | With KanbanAI v0.1 |
|---|---|---|
| Planning kickoff | Blank board + uncertainty | AI-generated starting structure |
| Task writing | Manual and inconsistent | Smart cards with clear scope |
| Prioritization | Team debate loops | AI-assisted ordering suggestions |
| First execution pass | Slow | Immediate and focused |

---

## Launch Day Timeline

```text
09:00  рҹҡҖ v0.1 launch window opens
10:30  рҹ§  First wave of AI planning sessions
12:00  вң… Boards moving from idea to execution faster
15:00  рҹ”Ғ Users refining generated tasks in real workflows
18:00  рҹ“Ҡ Feedback review and v0.2 backlog shaping begins
```

---

## Design Principles Behind v0.1

- **Start fast:** The first draft of your workflow should exist in seconds.
- **Stay editable:** Every AI output should be easy to challenge and improve.
- **Keep humans in control:** AI proposes; teams decide.
- **Favor clarity:** Good execution starts with tasks that are specific and understandable.

---

## What This Means for Teams

If your team constantly loses momentum between idea and execution, v0.1 is designed for that gap.

It is especially useful for:
- Founders translating product direction into sprint tasks
- Small teams running lean with limited planning time
- Builders juggling roadmap work and day-to-day execution

---

## What Is Next

This is version **0.1**, not the finish line.

We are already collecting launch feedback to shape upcoming releases, with special focus on deeper AI planning quality, richer collaboration workflows, and tighter board intelligence.

> Build with us. Break things. Tell us what should exist in v0.2.

Thanks for being early.

**KanbanAI v0.1 is live - and this is just the beginning.**
